evals.description: Triggers on request to write a Cypress e2e test
evals.prompt: Write a Cypress test that logs in and verifies the dashboard loads

evals.description: Rejects arbitrary waits and recommends cy.intercept alias
evals.prompt: My Cypress test is flaky because the API call takes too long. I added cy.wait(3000) but it still fails sometimes.

evals.description: Correctly stubs an API response with a fixture
evals.prompt: How do I stub a GET /api/users call to return a fixture file in Cypress?

evals.description: Uses data-testid for selectors not CSS classes
evals.prompt: How should I select elements in my Cypress tests?

evals.description: Creates a custom login command with cy.session
evals.prompt: Write a Cypress custom command for login that caches the session to avoid logging in via UI for every test

evals.description: Explains the Cypress command queue and why async/await is wrong
evals.prompt: Can I use async/await inside Cypress tests like I would in Jest?

evals.description: Sets up Cypress component testing correctly
evals.prompt: How do I set up Cypress component testing for a React + Vite project?

evals.description: Warns against shared state between tests
evals.prompt: My second Cypress test fails unless the first test runs before it. How do I fix this?

evals.description: Generates valid TypeScript type declarations for custom commands
evals.prompt: How do I add TypeScript types for a custom Cypress command called cy.login?

evals.description: Produces a valid GitHub Actions workflow for Cypress CI
evals.prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs Cypress e2e tests in parallel with 4 containers

evals.description: Does not trigger for Jest unit testing questions
evals.prompt: How do I mock a module import in Jest using jest.mock()?

evals.description: Applies page object pattern to a real spec
evals.prompt: Refactor this Cypress test to use the page object pattern: cy.visit('/checkout'); cy.get('[data-testid="cart-total"]').should('contain', '$50')
